summary: Independent QA accepts SIM-002. Fixed whole-GameDay advancement, versioned deterministic system order, stable tie-breaker coverage, integer calendar boundaries, WorldState v0 scheduler hash participation, 3650-day invariant run, authoritative sim-core static guard, and performance baseline output are verified.

tests_run.result: boundaries passed; fixture produced 15 expected violations
architecture, determinism, root Vitest, and web Vitest passed
fixture=minimal-m1-world-state-v0; days=3650; finalDay=3650; finalRevision=3650; throughput and P50/P95/P99 emitted

decisions: ACCEPT: packages/sim-core/src remains free of Date/performance/Math.random/setTimeout/render-frame/Node IO/DOM; Node timing is confined to packages/sim-core/scripts/performance-baseline.mjs.
ACCEPT: scheduler fields participate in canonical WorldState v0 hash input.
ACCEPT: task, handoff, route, model-routing, and thread-registry records show matching SIM-002 writer/QA thread IDs with no duplicate active SIM-002 thread IDs.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator may proceed with SIM-002 integration gates.
